case_title: CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO VS. FRANCESCHIS INC.

docket_entries.description: SUMMARY JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO ,A MUNICIPAL CORPORATION AS TO DEFENDANT FRANCESCHIS INC. JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
